calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Dulamjav Urjinkhand, an individual and dba "Gangnam BBQ" and Defendant Whar Han Ng, an individual and dba "Gangnam BBQ".

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:43:22 a.m., and concluding at 11:16:17 a.m. (D505)

John P. Byrne,Esq. representing and appearing for Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P., A Delaware Limited Partnership.
Darren Iverson, sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Defendant Dulamjav Urjinkhand, an individual and dba "Gangnam BBQ" and Defendant Whar Han Ng, an individual and dba "Gangnam BBQ" not appearing.

Counsel to provide a summary.
Court and counsel discuss the ledger, past due amounts, amounts owed and present lessee.
Court examines witness.
Witness confirms that statements and declarations made are true and accurate.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:
Damages $502,345.97
Interest $0
Costs $681.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Total Judgment $503,026.97

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Nov-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
